items.title: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.author: obra
items.summary_zh: Superpowers 是一套面向 AI 代理的“技能框架”和软件开发方法论。它试图解决当前大模型在复杂任务中缺乏结构化思考的问题——通过定义清晰的技能单元和协作流程，让 AI 代理像人类工程师一样分步解决问题。这个框架不仅给 AI 用，也可以指导人类团队如何拆解需求、编写代码、进行测试。如果你在探索如何让 AI 更可靠地参与实际项目开发，或者想建立更高效的工程协作流程，值得关注。
items.summary_en: Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to make AI agents work more reliably on complex engineering tasks. Instead of letting a model guess its way through a problem, it decomposes work into defined skills, checks, and iterative steps—similar to how a senior engineer would approach a feature. The framework is practical enough to be used by human teams as well. If you're building AI-powered coding tools or want to inject disciplined structure into your development workflow, this project offers a fresh, actionable approach.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
items.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
items.author: ripienaar
items.summary_zh: 这是一个在GitHub上持续更新的资源列表，专门汇总了各类SaaS、PaaS和IaaS服务的免费套餐。对于DevOps和基础设施开发者来说，它就像一份宝藏地图，能帮你在预算有限的情况下快速找到合适的云工具，从而降低创业或实验成本。无论是搭建个人项目还是测试新技术，这个列表都能节省大量搜索时间。
items.summary_en: This is a constantly updated GitHub repository that curates a comprehensive list of SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS offerings with free tiers. It serves as a treasure map for DevOps and infrastructure developers, helping them quickly identify cloud tools that fit tight budgets. Whether you're bootstrapping a startup, running personal projects, or experimenting with new technologies, this list dramatically reduces the time spent hunting for cost-effective solutions, making it an essential resource for anyone who wants to build without breaking the bank.

items.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.author: msitarzewski
items.summary_zh: agency-agents是一个开源项目，提供了一套完整的AI代理团队，包括前端专家、社交媒体运营、创意注入者等各种角色。开发者可以通过简单的配置快速组建自己的AI“工作室”，无需从头训练每个模型。对于需要快速验证产品想法或自动化内容创作的个人和小团队来说，这个项目大大降低了AI应用的门槛，让每个人都能拥有一个虚拟的创业团队。
items.summary_en: Agency-agents is an open-source project that bundles a complete set of AI agents emulating a full-fledged digital agency. It includes roles like frontend wizards, Reddit community managers, and whimsy injectors, allowing developers to assemble a tailored AI team with minimal configuration. The beauty lies in its plug-and-play nature — you don't need to train each agent from scratch. For indie hackers, startup founders, and content creators, this means rapidly prototyping products or automating online presence without hiring a real team. It's a glimpse into a future where AI collaborates in structured, specialized groups.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.

items.title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
items.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: 微软推出的《AI for Beginners》课程是一套为期12周、共24课时的免费学习资源，专为零基础学习者设计。课程覆盖机器学习、神经网络、计算机视觉等核心主题，结合实践项目，帮助初学者系统掌握人工智能基础。无论学生还是转行者，都能借此轻松入门AI领域。
items.summary_en: Microsoft's AI for Beginners is a free, structured curriculum that spans 12 weeks with 24 lessons, covering essential AI topics like machine learning, neural networks, and computer vision. It's designed for absolute beginners, offering hands-on projects and clear explanations. This repo makes AI education accessible to everyone, from students to career changers, providing a solid foundation without needing prior experience. It's a perfect starting point for anyone curious about artificial intelligence.

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.author: mvanhorn
items.summary_zh: mvanhorn/last30days-skill 是一个 AI 代理技能，能自动从 Reddit、X、YouTube、Hacker News、Polymarket 和全网搜索某个话题，并合成一份有据可循的摘要。它解决了信息碎片化问题，帮助研究者、内容和投资者快速了解最近30天内的舆论热点和市场情绪。
items.summary_en: mvanhorn/last30days-skill is an AI agent capability that automatically researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the broader web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. It tackles information fragmentation, making it invaluable for researchers, content creators, and investors who need a quick, reliable overview of recent discourse and sentiment around a topic.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: 8点1氪丨“史上最严电池安全令”正式施行；苹果大量机密文件遭泄露；OpenAI首款硬件曝光
items.summary_zh: 今日科技圈迎来多项重磅消息：被称为“史上最严电池安全令”的法规正式施行，将大幅提升电动车和电子产品的电池安全标准；苹果公司大量机密文件遭泄露，涉及未发布产品和企业内部战略；OpenAI 首款硬件产品也首次曝光，预示其从软件向硬件领域扩张。这三件事分别影响行业监管、企业安全和硬件创新，值得持续关注。
items.summary_en: Today's tech news brings three major developments: China's strictest battery safety regulation takes effect, raising the bar for electric vehicles and consumer electronics; a massive leak of Apple confidential documents reveals unreleased products and internal strategies; and OpenAI's first hardware device has been unveiled, marking its expansion beyond software. These stories impact regulatory compliance, corporate security, and AI hardware innovation, making them crucial for industry watchers.

items.title: 中国第一，直逼OpenAI，神秘“扫地僧”冲到全球前七
items.summary_zh: 中国一家此前低调的AI团队异军突起，其开发的大模型在权威评测中排名全球第七，仅次于OpenAI，成为国内第一。这一成绩打破了外界对中国AI水平的刻板印象，证明中国团队在基础模型研发上已具备世界级竞争力。该团队保持神秘，被称为“扫地僧”，其技术突破引发行业广泛关注。
items.summary_en: A previously unknown Chinese AI team has quietly risen to become the country's top performer in global large language model rankings, securing seventh place worldwide just behind OpenAI. Dubbed a 'low-profile master', the team's achievement challenges stereotypes about China's AI capabilities and demonstrates world-class strength in foundational model research. The breakthrough has sparked intense interest in both the technology and the mysterious team behind it.

items.title: 刚刚，Fable 5全球解禁
items.summary_zh: 备受期待的游戏《神鬼寓言5》（Fable 5）刚刚在全球范围内解禁，玩家和媒体终于可以公开分享评测和体验。作为经典角色扮演系列的重启之作，本作由Playground Games开发，继承了系列的奇幻风格和自由玩法。解禁意味着大量实机演示和评价即将涌现，对于期待已久的粉丝来说，现在是最佳的信息获取时机。
items.summary_en: Fable 5, the highly anticipated reboot of the classic RPG franchise, has just been globally released from embargo. Developed by Playground Games, the game retains the series' signature whimsical fantasy setting and player-driven choices. With the embargo lift, reviews and gameplay footage are flooding in, giving eager fans a clear picture of whether this revival lives up to the legacy. It's a major moment for Xbox gaming and role-playing enthusiasts.

items.title: 半年不写代码，Claude Code之父：3年后写代码的人暴涨100倍
items.summary_zh: Claude Code的创始人在半年未曾亲手写代码后，大胆预测三年后能写代码的人将暴增100倍。这背后是AI编程工具正在将专业开发的门槛夷为平地，让设计师、产品经理甚至普通用户都能通过自然语言生成代码。这一观点揭示了编程从专业技能向通用素养转变的趋势，意义在于让更多人参与数字创造，但也引发了对职业程序员未来的思考。
items.summary_en: The father of Claude Code, who hasn't written code himself in half a year, boldly predicts that the number of people who can code will surge 100 times in three years. This reflects how AI-powered coding tools are leveling the professional barrier, enabling designers, product managers, and even ordinary users to generate code through natural language. His insight underscores a shift from programming as a specialized skill to a universal literacy, meaning more people can participate in digital creation, while also sparking debates about the future of professional developers.

items.title: 存储巨头下场“救市”
items.summary_zh: 存储行业巨头突然出手，以大幅降价和推出高性价比产品的方式介入市场，试图扭转因需求疲软和竞争加剧导致的低迷局面。这一举动既是为了消化库存、巩固市场份额，也在倒逼中小厂商跟进，引发全行业的价格洗牌。对于消费者而言，这意味着可以以更低成本获得更大容量的存储设备，但行业的长期盈利能力将面临严峻考验。
items.summary_en: A major storage giant has stepped in to rescue the market by slashing prices and launching cost-effective products, aiming to reverse a slump caused by weak demand and fierce competition. This move not only helps clear inventory and solidify its market share, but also forces smaller players to follow suit, triggering a price reshuffle across the industry. For consumers, it means cheaper access to higher-capacity storage devices, though the long-term profitability of the sector will face serious challenges.

items.title: 大厂HR破防了：年轻人用Agent找工作，AI辅助面试太离谱
items.summary_zh: 年轻人开始利用AI Agent自动投递简历、生成定制化求职信，甚至让AI模拟面试官进行练习，这种“AI辅助求职”让大厂HR直呼破防。它不仅大幅提高了求职效率，也让简历筛选和面试环节面临前所未有的挑战——HR很难分辨哪些表现是真实能力，哪些是AI代劳。这一现象正在倒逼招聘流程改革，迫使企业寻找新的评估方法。
items.summary_en: Young job seekers are now using AI agents to auto-submit resumes, generate tailored cover letters, and even simulate interviews with AI mock interviewers, leaving big-company HR managers astonished. This AI-assisted job hunting not only boosts efficiency dramatically but also challenges traditional screening and interviewing processes, as HR struggles to tell whether a candidate's performance is genuine or AI-crafted. The trend is forcing companies to rethink their recruitment methods and seek new ways to assess real capabilities.

items.title: Kimi的钱，永远不够花
items.summary_zh: Kimi作为国产大模型明星产品，虽然凭借长文本处理能力和免费策略吸引了海量用户，但其高昂的算力和运营成本让资金始终捉襟见肘。即便有大额融资，研发投入和服务器开销就像无底洞，使得Kimi在商业化变现上步履蹒跚。这一问题反映了当前AI创业公司的普遍困境：用户增长和烧钱速度赛跑，盈利模式尚未跑通，行业洗牌或近在咫尺。
items.summary_en: Kimi, the star Chinese large language model, has attracted massive users with its long-context capability and free strategy, yet it's perpetually strapped for cash due to sky-high computing and operational costs. Despite sizable funding rounds, R&D spending and server bills drain money like a black hole, leaving Kimi struggling to find a viable monetization path. This predicament mirrors a common challenge among AI startups: user growth races against cash burn, and a clear profit model remains elusive, signaling that a market shakeout may be imminent.

items.title: 大规模封号后，Claude 突然发布更便宜的新模型
items.summary_zh: 在经历大规模封号风波导致用户信任受损后，Anthropic突然发布了更便宜的Claude新模型。此举意在用更低价格吸引被封号影响或因价格犹豫的用户，快速收复失地。新模型在保持核心能力的同时显著降低了调用成本，直接冲击OpenAI等竞争对手的定价体系。这既是危机公关，也是战略调整，对于开发者和小型企业来说，意味着可以用更低的成本接入顶尖AI能力。
items.summary_en: After a massive account suspension wave eroded user trust, Anthropic abruptly released a cheaper new Claude model. The move aims to win back users deterred by the bans or price concerns, quickly reclaiming ground. The new model maintains core capabilities while drastically cutting inference costs, directly challenging the pricing of rivals like OpenAI. This is both a crisis management play and a strategic pivot, meaning developers and small businesses can now access top-tier AI at a much lower cost.

items.title: 刚刚，Anthropic发布Sonnet 5，性能接近Opus 4.8，但不一定更便宜
items.summary_zh: Anthropic刚刚发布了Sonnet 5模型，它的性能已经非常接近Opus 4.8的水平，但价格却不一定会更便宜。这意味着开发者可以用较低的成本享受到接近顶级模型的能力，不过实际定价策略可能比想象中复杂，需要仔细核算才能判断是否真的划算。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has released Sonnet 5, a model whose performance approaches that of Opus 4.8, though it may not necessarily be cheaper. This offers users near-top-tier capabilities at potentially lower costs, but the pricing dynamics remain nuanced. Companies must carefully evaluate total cost of ownership as inference optimization continues to evolve. For AI practitioners seeking cost-effective high performance, this release signals a strategic shift toward more accessible advanced AI, but the actual savings depend on usage patterns and deployment scale.

items.title: AGI倒计时，OpenAI首席研究官重磅表态：留给人类的窗口“很小”
items.summary_zh: OpenAI首席研究官就AGI发展发表重磅表态，称留给人类的窗口期“很小”，暗示AGI可能很快到来。这一言论立刻引发了科技圈关于AI安全、伦理和人类未来的广泛讨论，提醒整个行业必须正视技术快速演进带来的严峻挑战，而不仅仅是追求性能突破。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's Chief Research Officer has made a striking statement about the imminent arrival of AGI, warning that the window for humanity to prepare is 'very small.' This declaration has sparked intense debate on AI safety, ethics, and the future of human civilization across the tech community. It underscores the urgency of addressing challenges posed by rapid AI advancement, urging researchers and policymakers to prioritize alignment and control mechanisms alongside performance gains. The message is clear: the timeline for responsible AGI deployment may be much shorter than many assume.

items.title: Agent 狂吞 Token，表面是模型之争，底层全是煤电博弈
items.summary_zh: AI Agent正在疯狂消耗大量Token，表面上看是各家大模型能力的较量，但底层真正的博弈其实围绕着能源和算力，尤其是对煤电等传统能源的依赖。这揭示了AI规模化应用背后隐藏的能源困境，开发者必须重视可持续性和成本控制，否则模型再强也难以为继。
items.summary_en: AI agents are devouring massive amounts of tokens, and while the surface narrative revolves around model competition, the underlying reality is a battle over energy and computing power, particularly coal-fired electricity. This highlights the sustainability challenges facing large-scale AI deployment. As inference costs surge, the true differentiator may shift from model quality to energy efficiency and cost management. Developers must consider not only performance but also the environmental and financial implications of running agent-based systems at scale, making energy-aware architecture a new priority.

items.title: Atlassian 揭秘 Forge 计费架构：如何在分布式环境下实现大规模用量计费
items.summary_zh: Atlassian公开了其Forge平台的计费架构设计细节，展示了在分布式环境下如何实现大规模用量计费。这套方案为构建云原生应用计费系统提供了宝贵的实战经验，特别适用于需要处理海量租户、复杂计费场景的开发团队，是平台工程领域不可多得的技术分享。
items.summary_en: Atlassian has unveiled the billing architecture behind Forge, detailing how it achieves large-scale usage-based billing in a distributed environment. This provides valuable insights for building cloud-native billing systems, particularly for teams managing massive multi-tenant deployments with complex pricing models. The architecture addresses challenges like accurate metering, horizontal scaling, and real-time aggregation across regions. It's a must-read for platform engineers designing fair, transparent, and cost-efficient billing solutions for SaaS and PaaS products, offering practical patterns from a mature production system.

items.title: Cursor、OpenClaw 同时出手，“口袋编程”时代来了：程序员只用“动嘴”！
items.summary_zh: Cursor和OpenClaw等工具同时发力，开启了“口袋编程”时代——程序员只需通过语音指令就能写代码，真正实现了“动嘴编程”。这大幅降低了编程的门槛，极大提高了移动场景下的开发效率，也让非专业开发者有了便捷的编程途径，正在重新定义人机协作的方式。
items.summary_en: With tools like Cursor and OpenClaw, the era of 'pocket programming' has arrived: programmers can now write code simply by speaking. This voice-driven development paradigm dramatically lowers the barrier to coding and boosts productivity, especially for quick edits on mobile or for non-professional developers. By integrating natural language processing directly into code editors, these tools enable hands-free workflows that could transform how developers interact with their IDEs. It marks a significant shift toward more intuitive and accessible software development, though challenges with accuracy and complex logic remain.

items.title: 从 VCloud 到 Agentic VCloud：Agent 时代的范式重构
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了从传统VCloud向Agentic VCloud的范式转变。在智能体时代，云计算不再只是提供基础设施，而是演变为能理解意图、自主决策并协调执行任务的代理平台。这种重构意味着企业可以将复杂工作流交给云上的智能体处理，显著提升自动化水平和业务敏捷性。对于需要灵活应对市场变化、降低运维成本的CIO和技术架构师来说，这是必须关注的方向。
items.summary_en: This article explores the paradigm shift from traditional VCloud to Agentic VCloud in the age of intelligent agents. Cloud computing is no longer just infrastructure; it evolves into a platform that understands intent, makes autonomous decisions, and coordinates task execution. This reconstruction means businesses can delegate complex workflows to cloud-based agents, greatly improving automation and agility. For CIOs and architects seeking flexibility and reduced operational costs, this is a trend to watch closely.

items.title: Google OpenRL 是一个用于大型语言模型（LLM）后训练微调的实验性自托管 API
items.summary_zh: Google推出了OpenRL，这是一个实验性的自托管API，专门用于大型语言模型的后训练微调。它让开发者和企业能够在自己的环境中高效地执行强化学习微调，无需依赖外部云服务，从而更好地保护数据隐私并控制训练流程。对于那些希望针对特定任务优化LLM性能的团队来说，OpenRL提供了一种灵活且成本可控的方案。
items.summary_en: Google has introduced OpenRL, an experimental self-hosted API tailored for post-training fine-tuning of large language models. It allows developers and enterprises to efficiently perform reinforcement learning fine-tuning in their own environments, avoiding reliance on external cloud services and thus better safeguarding data privacy and controlling the training pipeline. For teams aiming to optimize LLM performance on specific tasks, OpenRL offers a flexible and cost-controllable solution.

items.title: 8 人起家年入上亿美元，推出自研大模型对战 Cursor、Claude Code？
items.summary_zh: 一个仅有8人的初创团队，年收入突破一亿美元，并推出了自研的大模型直接对标Cursor和Claude Code。这支团队以极精简的人力实现了惊人的商业增长，他们的故事揭示了在AI代码辅助领域，小团队凭借垂直深耕和高效执行也能撼动巨头。对于创业者和技术投资人而言，这是一个关于如何用最少资源撬动最大价值的典型案例。
items.summary_en: A startup with only eight people has achieved an annual revenue exceeding one hundred million dollars and launched its own large language model to directly challenge Cursor and Claude Code. With a remarkably lean team, they have achieved stunning commercial growth, showing that in AI-assisted coding, small teams can disrupt giants through deep vertical focus and efficient execution. For entrepreneurs and tech investors, this is a classic case of leveraging minimal resources for maximum impact.

items.title: Anthropic 负责人：HTML 比 MD 更利于人类跟进智能体协作流程
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的负责人指出，在智能体协作流程中，使用HTML比Markdown更有利于人类跟进和理解。这是因为HTML的结构化标记能够更直观地展示逻辑关系、层级嵌套和交互状态，而Markdown的简洁性反而在复杂协作中造成信息模糊。这一观点对于设计人机协作界面和文档标准的开发者具有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: A lead at Anthropic argues that in agent collaboration workflows, HTML is more effective than Markdown for human follow-through and understanding. HTML's structured markup more intuitively reveals logical relationships, hierarchical nesting, and interaction states, whereas Markdown's simplicity can lead to ambiguity in complex collaboration. This insight offers valuable guidance for developers designing human-AI interfaces and documentation standards.

items.title: 3000块钱，这支中国团队把ChatGPT成功的“秘密”用在了机器人训练上
items.summary_zh: 一支中国团队仅用3000元人民币的成本，就将ChatGPT成功的核心方法——基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）和Transformer架构——应用到了机器人训练中。他们通过巧妙的优化和资源复用，大幅降低了机器人智能化的门槛。这项突破意味着中小型制造企业和研究机构也能以极低的预算训练出具备自适应能力的机器人，有望加速工业自动化的普及。
items.summary_en: A Chinese team spent just 3,000 RMB to apply the core methodologies behind ChatGPT's success—reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and Transformer architecture—to robot training. Through clever optimization and resource reuse, they dramatically lowered the barrier to robot intelligence. This breakthrough means small and medium manufacturers and research labs can train adaptive robots on a tiny budget, potentially accelerating the adoption of industrial automation.

items.title: 非科班出身技术Geek，被DeepSeek改写人生（上集）
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讲述了一位非计算机科班出身的极客，如何因一次偶然的机会接触到DeepSeek，并将其作为支点彻底改写了自己的人生轨迹。他原本只是业余爱好编程，却通过DeepSeek获得了前所未有的技术视野和实战机会，最终成功转型为AI领域的工程师。这不仅是一个个人逆袭的故事，更折射出大模型时代对技术人才的重塑力量——能力比学历更重要，热爱与行动能跨越专业壁垒。
items.summary_en: This story follows a self-taught tech enthusiast with no formal computer science background, whose life was completely transformed after encountering DeepSeek. Initially a hobbyist coder, he leveraged DeepSeek to gain deep technical insights and real-world opportunities, eventually transitioning into a full-fledged AI engineer. It highlights how large language models can democratize access to cutting-edge technology, proving that passion and initiative can override traditional academic barriers, inspiring anyone who feels sidelined by their lack of formal credentials.

items.title: AI 接进企业之后，API 安全开始成为新盲区
items.summary_zh: 随着企业将AI能力接入内部系统，API安全正悄然成为新的盲区。文章指出，当AI模型通过大量API与业务数据、用户行为交互时，传统安全策略往往只关注入口防护，却忽略了API调用过程本身可能带来的数据泄露、越权访问和模型投毒等风险。企业急需建立针对AI API的专属安全治理框架，否则智能化的便利可能反噬企业信息安全。
items.summary_en: As enterprises integrate AI into their internal systems, API security is emerging as a critical blind spot. The article explains that when AI models interact with business data and user behavior through numerous APIs, traditional perimeter defenses overlook vulnerabilities such as data leakage, unauthorized access, and model poisoning during API calls. Companies urgently need dedicated security governance for AI APIs, otherwise the convenience of AI could turn into a backdoor that compromises the entire information infrastructure.

items.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.author: kirushik
items.summary_zh: Claude Code被发现会在发出的请求中嵌入隐写术标记，这一做法引发了广泛讨论。这些标记以不易察觉的方式隐藏在正常数据流里，可能用于追溯请求来源、防止篡改或进行版权声明。虽然隐写本身并非恶意，但它意味着用户与AI交互时可能被无感追踪，从而引发隐私和透明度方面的担忧。对于注重数据隐蔽性和控制权的开发者来说，这无疑是个需要警惕的新动向。
items.summary_en: Claude Code has been discovered to embed steganographic marks within its outgoing requests, a technique that hides data in plain sight. These marks can trace the origin of requests, prevent tampering, or assert copyright. While not inherently malicious, the practice raises privacy and transparency concerns, as users may be unknowingly tracked during AI interactions. For developers who value data sovereignty and fine-grained control, this revelation signals a need to scrutinize how AI tools handle metadata beyond the obvious outputs.

items.title: Qwen 3.6 27B is the sweet spot for local development
items.author: stared
items.summary_zh: Qwen 3.6 27B模型被社区誉为本地开发的“甜蜜点”，它在参数规模与性能消耗之间取得了巧妙平衡。27B的参数体量足以支撑复杂的代码生成、逻辑推理和自然语言理解，同时又能在消费级GPU上流畅运行，大大降低了个人开发者使用大模型的门槛。无论是用于本地IDE辅助编程，还是搭建私有AI助手，它都展现出不亚于云端大模型的实用价值，尤其适合对数据隐私和低延迟有严格要求的场景。
items.summary_en: The Qwen 3.6 27B model is hailed as the sweet spot for local development, striking an ideal balance between model capability and resource consumption. With 27 billion parameters, it handles complex code generation, reasoning, and language understanding, yet runs smoothly on consumer-grade GPUs, lowering the barrier for individual developers. It is especially valuable for offline IDE assistants or private AI agents where data privacy and low latency are paramount, providing near-cloud-level utility without the need for constant internet connectivity.

items.title: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
items.author: jms703
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2在最新的基准测试中击败了Claude，成为又一款引人注目的开源大模型。这个来自智谱AI的新版本在多项能力评估上展现了更强的推理和对话表现，尤其是在中文理解和复杂任务上优势明显。对于开源社区来说，这意味着除了Llama和Mistral之外，又多了一个能比肩顶级闭源模型的选择。开发者可以自由部署和微调，而性能的提升也让它更有潜力应用到实际产品中。
items.summary_en: GLM 5.2 has beaten Claude in recent benchmarks, emerging as another impressive open-source large language model. Developed by Zhipu AI, this new version demonstrates stronger reasoning and conversational abilities, particularly in Chinese understanding and complex tasks. For the open-source community, it represents a viable alternative to leading closed-source models like GPT-4 and Claude, joining the ranks of Llama and Mistral. The model's improved performance and open availability mean developers can freely deploy, fine-tune, and integrate it into real-world applications, leveling the playing field in AI capabilities.

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5
items.author: marinesebastian
items.summary_zh: Claude Sonnet 5是Anthropic最新发布的中等尺寸模型，旨在兼顾性能与成本效率。相比前代，它着重优化了上下文理解长度、指令遵循的准确性以及多轮对话中的一致性，同时在安全对齐方面做了进一步加固。对于需要高频调用AI但预算有限的团队来说，Sonnet 5是一个值得升级的选择。它在创意写作、商业分析和编程助手等任务中表现均衡，尤其适合那些希望在复杂场景中减少幻觉和偏差的严肃应用。
items.summary_en: Claude Sonnet 5 is Anthropic's latest mid-sized model, designed to balance performance with cost efficiency. It improves upon its predecessor in context window utilization, instruction following accuracy, and multi-turn conversation consistency, while reinforcing safety alignment. For teams that demand frequent AI calls on a budget, Sonnet 5 offers a worthwhile upgrade. It performs well in creative writing, business analysis, and coding assistance, making it a solid choice for serious applications that need reduced hallucination and bias without breaking the bank.

items.title: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
items.author: sambellll
items.summary_zh: HackerRank将其内部的应聘追踪系统（ATS）开源了，这对招聘行业来说是个有趣的举动。不过更有意思的是，一位博主测试自己的简历时，系统先后给出了90、74、88这样不稳定的评分，暴露出ATS在简历评估上存在明显的随机性和偏见。这一现象引发了对算法招聘公平性的讨论——当开源工具进入HR领域，我们不仅要看功能，更要警惕黑箱评分对求职者的潜在伤害。
items.summary_en: HackerRank open-sourced its Applicant Tracking System (ATS), an intriguing move for the recruiting world. But the real story came when a blogger tested their own resume and received wildly inconsistent scores: 90, then 74, then 88. This volatility highlights the randomness and potential bias embedded in algorithmic resume evaluation. The incident sparks a deeper conversation about fairness in AI-driven hiring—when open-source tools enter HR, we must scrutinize not just features but also how opaque scoring can harm candidates. It's a timely reminder that transparency alone isn't enough; reliability matters too.

items.title: Age verification is just a precursor to automated attribution of speech
items.author: arkhiver
items.summary_zh: 一篇来自Hacker News的热门文章警告说，当前世界各地推行的年龄验证政策，表面上是为了保护未成年人，但本质上可能是自动言论归因的前奏。一旦实名或年龄验证成为上网的必要条件，平台就能将每句话、每个观点精确关联到具体个人，从而形成对公共讨论的全面监控。作者认为，这种技术一旦铺开，很难逆转，自由表达的空间将被严重挤压。文章引发了大量科技界人士对隐私和审查制度的担忧讨论。
items.summary_en: A widely discussed Hacker News article warns that age verification mandates, often justified as child protection, may really be a stepping stone to automated attribution of speech. Once verifying age or identity becomes a prerequisite for online access, platforms can precisely link every statement and opinion to specific individuals, enabling comprehensive surveillance of public discourse. The author argues that once deployed at scale, such infrastructure is nearly impossible to reverse, severely chilling free expression. The piece has sparked intense debate among tech commentators about privacy, anonymity, and the slippery slope toward mass censorship.

items.title: Pollen tried to remove my article and Google is assisting with it
items.author: taubek
items.summary_zh: 一位作者在Hacker News上爆料，称Pollen试图要求谷歌删除其一篇批评性文章，而谷歌似乎正在配合这一请求。这起事件引发了对平台权力与言论自由边界的讨论，作者质疑科技巨头是否在帮助企业压制不利信息，令人担忧内容审核的透明度。
items.summary_en: An author on Hacker News reported that Pollen attempted to have Google remove a critical article about them, with Google reportedly assisting in the process. This incident raises serious concerns about the transparency of content moderation and the power dynamics between tech giants and individuals. It highlights how companies might use copyright or policy complaints to suppress unfavorable narratives, sparking a debate on free speech and the accountability of platforms like Google in such takedown requests.

items.title: OpenRA
items.author: tosh
items.summary_zh: OpenRA是一个开源的即时战略游戏引擎重实现项目，让经典游戏如《命令与征服：红色警戒》能在现代操作系统上原生运行。它重构了游戏逻辑、网络对战和模组支持，带来现代化的界面和平衡调整。对于怀旧玩家来说，这是重温童年记忆的绝佳方式；对于开源爱好者，它展示了如何通过重新实现来延长经典软件的生命周期。项目还活跃地维护多人游戏匹配服务，让全球玩家能在线对战。
items.summary_en: OpenRA is an open-source reimplementation of classic real-time strategy game engines, allowing titles like Command & Conquer: Red Alert to run natively on modern operating systems. It rebuilds game logic, multiplayer networking, and mod support, adding modern UI tweaks and balance adjustments. For nostalgic gamers, it's a perfect way to revisit childhood memories; for open-source enthusiasts, it demonstrates how legacy software can be revived and kept alive. The project also maintains an active multiplayer matchmaking service, enabling global online play. It's a labor of love that preserves gaming history.

items.title: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测Skills + 8 个 MCP，开发效率直接拉满！
items.description: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测技能 + 8 个 MCP 服务器，开发效率直接拉满！ 先晒一下我装完的效果（见下图），所有技能均实测可用。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者亲测了32个Claude Code实用技能和8个MCP服务器，整理出一套完整的效率提升方案。这些技能覆盖代码补全、重构、调试等关键环节，配合MCP服务器实现任务自动化，让AI编程助手从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。文章强调所有技能均已真实可用，不是理论堆砌，适合所有使用Claude Code的开发者直接上手。
items.summary_en: A developer tested 32 practical Claude Code skills and 8 MCP servers, compiling a comprehensive guide to boost coding efficiency. These skills cover code completion, refactoring, and debugging, while the MCP servers automate repetitive tasks, transforming Claude Code from a gimmick into a real productivity tool. The author emphasizes that all tips have been verified in practice, making this resource valuable for any developer looking to get the most out of their AI coding assistant.

items.title: 30-year sentence for transporting zines is a five-alarm fire for free speech
items.author: xrd
items.summary_zh: 一名男子因运输自制小杂志被判处30年监禁，这一判决引发了关于言论自由的激烈讨论。案件涉及地下出版物，虽然内容可能具有争议性，但如此严厉的刑罚让许多人担忧法律正在过度压制非主流声音。无论是艺术家、活动家还是普通读者，都可能因此案而对创作和传播边缘内容感到寒意。它不仅仅是一个个案，更是对宪法第一修正案承诺的严峻考验。
items.summary_en: A man received a 30-year prison sentence for transporting zines, sparking fierce debate over free speech boundaries. The case revolves around underground publications that, while potentially controversial, are far from violent or inciting. Critics argue that such a harsh penalty chills expression and sets a dangerous precedent for creators, activists, and anyone sharing unconventional ideas. It's not just a legal anomaly but a five-alarm fire for First Amendment protections, raising urgent questions about how far the government can go to suppress non-mainstream voices.

items.title: European digital ID wallets rely on safety services of Google and Apple
items.author: donohoe
items.summary_zh: 欧洲正在推进数字身份钱包计划，但最新消息显示这些钱包在安全基础设施上严重依赖谷歌和苹果的服务。这意味着欧洲公民的数字身份验证、加密密钥管理甚至生物识别数据都可能经过美国科技巨头之手。虽然这能加快部署并降低开发成本，但也引发了隐私和主权方面的担忧，尤其是考虑到非欧洲公司可能受到美国法律管辖。对于关注数据自主权的用户和政策制定者来说，这是一个需要密切关注的动向。
items.summary_en: Europe's digital ID wallet initiative is making progress, but reports reveal that these wallets heavily rely on security services from Google and Apple for encryption, key management, and biometric authentication. While this approach speeds up deployment and reduces costs, it means European citizens' digital identities pass through U.S. tech giants, raising concerns about privacy, sovereignty, and potential exposure to foreign legal requests. For privacy-conscious users and policymakers, this dependency creates a tension between convenience and control over sensitive identity data.

items.title: Cursor for iOS
items.description: Build with coding agents from anywhere
items.summary_zh: Cursor推出了iOS版本，让你能在手机上使用编码代理进行开发。这意味着你可以随时随地写代码、调试甚至部署，不再局限于桌面电脑。它内置了AI驱动的代码补全和智能助手，能够理解上下文帮你完成重复性任务。对于经常在路上的程序员、自由职业者或者想利用碎片时间学习编程的人来说，这是一个改变游戏规则的工具，把专业开发环境装进了口袋里。
items.summary_en: Cursor has released an iOS app that brings its AI-powered coding agents to your phone, allowing you to write, debug, and even deploy code from anywhere. The app features intelligent code completion and a context-aware assistant that helps you handle repetitive tasks. For programmers who are always on the go, freelancers juggling multiple projects, or anyone wanting to code during commutes, this turns your iPhone into a portable development environment. It's a game-changer for mobile productivity, though heavy lifting might still require a desktop.

items.title: Agent Mode by Receiptor AI
items.description: Bookkeeping assistant that runs receipt workflows end-to-end
items.summary_zh: Receiptor AI推出的Agent Mode是一个端到端的记账助手，能够自动处理从收据扫描、分类到对账的整个工作流程。相比于传统手动录入或半自动工具，它利用AI理解收据上下文并完成复杂操作，大幅节省财务人员和小企业主的时间，减少出错率。
items.summary_en: Agent Mode by Receiptor AI is an end-to-end bookkeeping assistant that automates receipt workflows from scanning and categorization to reconciliation. Instead of manual data entry or basic OCR, it uses AI to understand receipt context and execute complex tasks like matching expenses to accounts. This saves significant time for freelancers and small business owners, reducing errors and freeing them from tedious financial admin, making bookkeeping nearly effortless.

items.title: Spira for Product Hunt Makers
items.description: Social media growth agents that build your momentum
items.summary_zh: Spira是一款专为Product Hunt开发者设计的社交媒体增长代理工具，它通过自动化策略帮助产品获得初始 momentum，例如发帖互动、评论和分享。对于刚刚上线产品、急需曝光但缺乏营销时间的创业者来说，Spira能够节省精力并快速积累早期用户反馈，把精力放回产品本身。
items.summary_en: Spira is a social media growth agent tailored for Product Hunt makers, automating interactions like posting, commenting, and sharing to build early momentum for new launches. For founders who lack time for manual promotion, Spira helps gain visibility and gather initial user feedback quickly. It's essentially a digital assistant that handles the social grind, allowing creators to focus on improving their product rather than chasing likes and comments.

items.title: discode.ai
items.description: 100+ AI models, one interface. ECO friendly.
items.summary_zh: Discode.ai是一个聚合了超过100种AI模型的统一接口平台，并主打环保理念。用户无需在多个服务之间切换，就能在一个界面上调用不同模型完成写作、编程、图像生成等任务。平台通过优化计算资源分配来降低能耗，宣称比分别使用各模型更环保。对于需要频繁尝试不同AI工具的开发者、创作者和中小企业来说，这既节省了时间，又兼顾了碳排放的减少。
items.summary_en: Discode.ai offers a single interface that aggregates over 100 AI models, from text generation to image creation, all while emphasizing eco-friendliness. Users can switch between models without leaving one platform, and the service optimizes compute resource allocation to reduce energy consumption compared to using separate tools. For developers, creators, and small businesses who frequently experiment with different AI models, it saves time and simplifies workflows. The green angle is a bonus for those mindful of their carbon footprint. It's a pragmatic solution for the multi-model era.

items.title: Skills Marketplace by Databox
items.description: Ready-made AI analytics skills for your business data
items.summary_zh: Databox推出了Skills Marketplace，这是一个预配置AI分析技能的集合，可以直接应用到你的商业数据上。你不再需要从头构建模型或编写复杂公式，只需选择适合的“技能”比如销售预测、客户分群或异常检测，即可快速获得洞察。对于中小企业和非技术营销人员来说，这大大降低了数据分析的门槛。想象一下，只需点击几下就能自动分析网站流量趋势或财务指标，确实很实用。
items.summary_en: Databox's Skills Marketplace offers a library of pre-built AI analytics skills that plug directly into your business data. Instead of building custom models or writing SQL queries, you can pick ready-made skills like sales forecasting, customer segmentation, or anomaly detection. This lowers the barrier for SMEs and non-technical marketers to gain actionable insights without data science expertise. With just a few clicks, you can automate complex analyses of web traffic, financial metrics, or operational KPIs. It's practical, time-saving, and brings enterprise-grade analytics to smaller teams.

items.title: GetCompress
items.description: Lossless media compression without context switching
items.summary_zh: GetCompress是一款无需切换上下文的无损媒体压缩工具。它能够在现有工作流中直接压缩图片和视频，保持画质的同时显著减小文件体积，省去了在不同应用间来回切换的麻烦，非常适合需要频繁处理大量媒体文件的设计师与内容创作者。
items.summary_en: GetCompress is a lossless media compression tool that eliminates context switching by allowing users to compress images and videos directly within their existing workflow. It maintains quality while significantly reducing file sizes, saving time for designers and content creators who regularly handle large media files. The tool integrates seamlessly, boosting productivity without requiring users to leave their current application.

items.title: ClinePass
items.description: Run the best open-weights models in Cline
items.summary_zh: ClinePass是一个让开发者能在Cline环境中直接运行最佳开源权重模型的工具，无需复杂配置或迁移代码。它解决了模型部署过程中的兼容性和性能瓶颈，尤其适合AI研究者与工程师快速测试不同模型，加速实验与集成流程，降低了使用开源模型的门槛。
items.summary_en: ClinePass enables developers to run the best open-weights models directly within the Cline environment without complex setup or code migration. It solves compatibility and performance issues commonly faced when deploying open-source models, making it ideal for AI researchers and engineers who need to quickly test different models. By streamlining the workflow, ClinePass reduces friction and speeds up experimentation, lowering the barrier to leveraging cutting-edge open models in real projects.

items.title: Foresight by Lightning Rod
items.description: Predict anything with AI
items.summary_zh: Lightning Rod推出的Foresight是一个AI预测工具，声称能对几乎任何事情做出预测，从市场趋势到个人决策。它利用机器学习分析历史数据和实时信息，输出概率和建议。比如你可以用它预测产品发布日期对销量的影响，或者评估投资风险。对于创业者、产品经理和数据分析师来说，这个工具把未来可能性变得可视化和可量化。不过，预测的准确性取决于输入数据的质量，仍然需要人类的判断力来解读结果。
items.summary_en: Foresight by Lightning Rod is an AI tool that promises to predict just about anything, from market trends to personal decisions. It uses machine learning to analyze historical data and real-time inputs, outputting probabilities and recommendations. For example, you could forecast how a product launch date will affect sales or assess investment risks. Entrepreneurs, product managers, and data analysts will find it useful for making better-informed decisions by quantifying uncertainties. However, the tool's accuracy hinges on data quality, and human judgment is still needed to interpret its outputs.

items.title: Persona.js
items.description: Add WebMCP-native AI chat to any Frontend
items.summary_zh: Persona.js是一个前端库，能让任何网页快速集成基于WebMCP原生协议的AI聊天功能。开发者只需引入脚本即可为网站添加智能对话助手，无需复杂后端，大大降低了AI聊天的接入门槛，适合希望快速提供客服或问答支持的各类网站。
items.summary_en: Persona.js is a frontend library that enables adding WebMCP-native AI chat to any website with minimal effort. Developers can integrate an intelligent conversational assistant by simply including a script, eliminating the need for a complex backend. This lowers the barrier for adding AI-powered customer support or Q&A, making it ideal for projects that want to quickly enhance user interaction with smart responses.

items.title: Dotient
items.description: Your local semantic search app
items.summary_zh: Dotient是一款本地语义搜索应用，允许用户通过自然语言在个人电脑上搜索文件和笔记。它利用本地AI模型进行语义理解，无需联网且保护隐私，为信息管理混乱的用户提供了一种更智能、更安全的检索方式。
items.summary_en: Dotient is a local semantic search app that lets users find files, notes, and content using natural language queries. Running entirely on-device with local AI models, it ensures privacy and works offline. This addresses the pain point of information overload by offering a smarter way to retrieve personal data without sending it to the cloud, benefiting anyone who struggles with disorganized digital storage.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 5 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门：从skills到Pixelle-Video，月榜社区火力集中在「把Agent做进工程化工作流」-能省Token、能记住上下文、能编排多Agent、能产出内容。
items.summary_zh: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门项目排行榜出炉，社区火力集中在“把Agent做进工程化工作流”这一主题上。这些项目不仅能够节省Token开销、记住对话上下文，还能编排多个Agent协作并产出高质量内容。对于开发者和技术团队来说，它们意味着更高效的AI工程化落地方案，让大模型从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: The top 10 GitHub projects for May 2026 have been released, with the community's energy concentrated on embedding agents into engineering workflows. These projects save token usage, retain conversation context, orchestrate multi-agent collaboration, and produce high-quality content. For developers and engineering teams, they represent a more efficient pathway for integrating AI into production, transforming large language models from novelties into genuine productivity tools.

items.title: 又是梁文锋，有点猛啊。
items.description: 又是梁文锋 前几天一年一度的高考不是刚落下帷幕嘛。 说巧不巧，正好这两天我在小绿书上好几次刷到有关一位国内 AI 圈顶级大佬当年的高考故事。 没错，这位大佬正是 DeepSeeek 的创始人：梁文锋。
items.summary_zh: 高考刚结束，网上又翻出了DeepSeek创始人梁文锋当年的高考故事。这位AI圈的顶级大佬，当年以优异成绩考入名校，如今带领DeepSeek在人工智能领域掀起波澜。他的经历不仅激励着无数考生，也让人看到技术人才如何从校园走向行业巅峰。梁文锋的故事再次证明，真正的创新往往源自深厚的学术积累和持续的坚持。
items.summary_en: Just as the annual college entrance exam wrapped up, stories about Liang Wenfeng, the founder of DeepSeek, resurfaced online. Back in the day, he achieved top scores on the gaokao and entered a prestigious university. Now, as a leading figure in the AI world, he is making waves with DeepSeek. His journey inspires students and professionals alike, showcasing how solid academic foundations and relentless persistence can drive groundbreaking innovation in the tech industry.

items.title: Skill学习指南🧑‍💻
items.description: Skill就是AI的"专项操作手册"，把特定领域的知识、流程和工具打包成一个模块。当AI需要处理专业任务时，就调用对应的Skill，让它像专家一样按规范工作。本文主要介绍Skill的基础入门知识。
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了Skill的概念，它就像AI的“专项操作手册”，把特定领域的知识、工作流程和工具整合成一个模块。当AI需要处理专业任务时，只需调用对应的Skill，就能像经验丰富的专家一样按规范高效工作。文章主要面向初学者，讲解Skill的基础入门知识，帮助读者理解如何通过这种模块化方式提升AI在具体场景下的执行能力，对开发者来说有很强的实用价值。
items.summary_en: This article introduces Skill as a specialized operation manual for AI, packaging domain-specific knowledge, workflows, and tools into a modulable unit. When AI needs to handle professional tasks, it can invoke the corresponding Skill and work like an expert following established rules. The piece focuses on basic entry-level knowledge, helping readers understand how this modular approach boosts AI's performance in specific scenarios. For developers, it offers a practical way to enhance AI capabilities without reinventing the wheel, making it a valuable guide for those looking to customize AI behavior for specialized applications.

items.title: 提示词工程已死，Loop Engineering 称王！保姆级教程 + 项目实战
items.description: 通俗易懂的 Loop Engineering 保姆级教程，用 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 三款主流 AI 编程工具实战体验 Loop 的效果，详解方法论框架和踩坑经验
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章提出了一个有趣的观点：提示词工程已经过时，现在是Loop Engineering的时代。作者用Claude Code、Codex和Cursor这三款主流AI编程工具进行了实战演示，手把手教读者如何应用Loop方法论，并分享了自己踩坑后总结出的实用经验。对于想要提升AI编程效率的开发者来说，这是一篇不可多得的实战指南，能帮助大家快速掌握更先进的与AI协作的方式。
items.summary_en: This article boldly declares that traditional prompt engineering is dead and replaced by Loop Engineering. The author offers a comprehensive, beginner-friendly tutorial using three popular AI coding tools—Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor—to demonstrate how to effectively apply the loop methodology in real projects. It also shares valuable lessons learned from common pitfalls. For developers looking to boost their productivity when collaborating with AI, this practical guide provides a fresh perspective and actionable techniques to master a more advanced way of working with coding assistants.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: DeepSeek正式官宣摇人，夯！
items.description: 话说 DeepSeek 这次真的是破天荒了。 自 2023 年正式创立以来，三年了，你啥时候见过这个公司专门大张旗鼓发公告招过人。 但是就在前几天，DeepSeek 直接丢出王炸，正式官宣大规模摇人，
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek自2023年创立以来首次正式发布大规模招聘公告，打破了此前低调、不主动招人的传统。这一动作表明DeepSeek正在加速扩张，可能为应对更激烈的AI竞争和业务增长做准备。对求职者而言，进入这家以技术见长的初创公司意味着参与前沿大模型研发的机会。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, the AI startup founded in 2023, has for the first time publicly announced a large-scale recruitment drive, marking a significant shift from its previous low-key hiring approach. This move signals rapid expansion, likely to fuel growth and compete in the increasingly crowded AI landscape. For job seekers, it represents a rare opportunity to join a company known for its strong technical focus and work on cutting-edge large language models, making it a notable event in the Chinese AI talent market.

items.title: 网传 Claude 通过原生消息传递获取用户位置，再以隐写术隐蔽回传封杀中国大陆用户，什么情况？你怎么看？
items.summary_zh: 近期有传闻称，Claude通过原生消息传递功能获取用户位置信息，再使用隐写术将数据隐蔽回传，以此封杀中国大陆用户。这一说法引发广泛质疑，用户担忧自己的隐私被悄悄泄露，同时也对AI服务的地区封锁手段产生讨论。目前该消息尚未得到官方证实，但已引起对AI数据收集透明度以及用户地理封锁机制的深度反思。
items.summary_en: A recent rumor claims that Claude uses native messaging to obtain user location, then employs steganography to covertly transmit the data back, thereby blocking users from mainland China. This allegation has sparked widespread skepticism, with users concerned about their privacy being secretly harvested and the methods used for regional restrictions on AI services. While unconfirmed by official sources, the discussion has prompted deeper reflection on data collection transparency and geo-blocking mechanisms in AI products, highlighting the tension between security controls and user trust.

items.title: 窦文涛追问 Papi 酱为何不叫继母「妈妈」，还反问「你觉得你对吗」，如何评价他的访谈方式？
items.summary_zh: 在访谈节目中，窦文涛追问Papi酱为何不叫继母“妈妈”，并反问“你觉得你对吗”，这一追问方式引发了关于访谈边界和伦理的讨论。有人认为窦文涛的追问过于强势，可能侵犯个人情感隐私；也有人认为这是直击话题的犀利主持风格。事件本身反映了公众对家庭关系定义、继母称谓以及媒体采访尺度的多元看法。
items.summary_en: In an interview, Dou Wentao pressed Papi Jiang about why she doesn't call her stepmother 'mom,' and even countered with 'Do you think you're right?' This questioning style sparked debate over interview boundaries and ethics. Some viewers criticized it as too aggressive, potentially invading personal emotional privacy, while others defended it as sharp and direct hosting. The incident highlights diverse public opinions on family relationship definitions, stepmother appellations, and appropriate media interviewing standards, raising questions about the line between probing and prying.

items.title: 香港演员吴启华卖 20 岁肖像权拍 AI 电影，如何看待这一选择？对行业意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: 香港演员吴启华将自己20岁时的肖像权出售，用于制作AI电影。这一选择引发了关于明星数字资产变现和演员身份未来的讨论。吴启华认为这是合理利用技术保住青春形象，但业界担忧AI换脸和数字替身可能冲击传统演艺行业。对演员来说，肖像权成为可交易的数字资产，但对行业意味着传统表演价值和版权保护将面临新挑战。
items.summary_en: Hong Kong actor Lawrence Ng sold the rights to his 20-year-old likeness for the production of an AI movie. This decision has sparked debate about monetizing digital assets of celebrities and the future of the acting profession. Ng sees it as a smart way to preserve his youthful image through technology, but industry observers worry that AI face-swapping and digital doubles could disrupt traditional acting roles. For actors, likeness rights become tradable digital assets, yet for the industry it signals new challenges to the value of live performance and intellectual property protection in an age of synthetic media.

items.title: 如何评价 Anthropic 最新发布的 Claude Sonnet5？
items.summary_zh: Anthropic近期发布了Claude Sonnet5，这是其最新的大型语言模型版本。Sonnet5在推理、代码生成和多语言理解方面进行了显著优化，据称在处理复杂逻辑和长文本时表现更稳定。该模型延续了Claude系列重视安全性的传统，同时提升了回答的准确性和创造性。对于开发者和内容创作者来说，这是一个值得关注的升级，有望在编程辅助、知识问答等场景中提供更高效的服务。
items.summary_en: Anthropic recently released Claude Sonnet5, the latest iteration of its large language model. The new version features significant optimizations in reasoning, code generation, and multilingual understanding, with claims of more stable performance on complex logic and long-form texts. It continues the Claude series' emphasis on safety while improving answer accuracy and creativity. For developers and content creators, this upgrade is noteworthy — it promises more efficient assistance in coding, Q&A, and other domains. Sonnet5 represents Anthropic's ongoing efforts to balance powerful capabilities with responsible AI deployment, potentially setting a new benchmark for conversational AI.
